fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the contact.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the owner of the contact.

fields.name: companyContact
fields.description: The contact information for the company.

fields.name: companyName
fields.description: The name of the company associated with the contact.

fields.name: companyPerson
fields.description: The person associated with the company contact.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: The first name of the contact.

fields.name: middleName
fields.description: The middle name of the contact.

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: The last name of the contact.

fields.name: email
fields.description: The email address of the contact.

fields.name: fromDate
fields.description: The start date associated with the contact.

fields.name: toDate
fields.description: The end date associated with the contact.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The date and time when the contact was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The date and time when the contact was last modified.
